title: helenium macrocephalum
intro: Helenium macrocephalum, also known as the large-flowered sneezeweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. Native to North America, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helenium macrocephalum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and colds. The plant is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to promote healing and prevent infections.
